rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching logic
Place component type contracts in type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers for ports and variables in contracts
Place output guarantees in component type scopes
Use concrete bounds or named constants for assumptions and guarantees
Use AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, and constants
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE type names (integer, boolean)
Do not use component ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
